reference: Two weeks ago, I lost about two pints of blood, bleeding from the rectum. I was hospitalized, received two pints of blood, and was told I have diverticulosis. I also had a colonoscopy, and they found two polyps. I did not get the results back yet. Could the profuse bleeding from the rectum mean that I have cancer?
text: Two weeks ago, I lost about two pints of blood bleeding from the rectum. I was hospitalized, received two pints of blood, and was told I had muculosis. I also had a colonoscopy, and they found two polyps. I did not get the results back yet. Could the profuse bleeding from the rectum mean that I have cancer?
